name: harness-tdd-workflow
description: Multi-agent TDD workflow commands and artifact templates for SpecKit
author: Harness Sandbox Team

test.description: Spawn @test-specialist agent to write failing tests for a feature

review.description: Spawn review agents for code and architecture review (Phase 3)

commit.description: Create Git commit with TDD workflow metadata (Phase 3)

plan.description: Generate multi-agent execution plan for feature (Phase 3)
